author: @darreldorigatti862
text:
Fight game theory: I think Dana White is seeing the value in pro wrestling. Yeah, it's fake. It's also fun. Good drama draws interest and hooks people into upcoming events way more.

I think he's been testing a game plan with Sean. Just tipping toes into drama farming and seeing how the numbers react. I'd say it's working.

Edit: Seriously, Sean is so perfect for this role. He's quite the character. It makes sense. It's about fun. Like, everyone can admit pro wrestling is better then watching stale ass boxing, right? We gotta spice up the pay per view ticket a bit.
